title: Rago's Mac Adventure
description: This Modpack is for my friend & I. If you want to try a super low performance adventure with friends, then this is your chance! This modpack is made especially for mac players. If you play in windows and want to get rid of McMouser and MacOS Input Fixes
body:
This Modpack is for my friend & I. If you want to try a super low performance adventure with friends, then this is your chance!

![Far_General_View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8dd5370f19886b9be6a7190fcee4d937ccc26b2.png)

This modpack is made especially for mac players. If you play in windows you would want to delete _MacOS Input Fixes_
______________________________________________________________________________________
This mod has up to 98 mods which includes optimization, adventure, magic, client, storage, technologic and more mods.
Mod list:
- [Deprecated] Farmer’s Delight [Fabric] - by Zifiv
